subject: kernel: kexec_file: fix error return code of kexec_calculate_store_digests()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. Accept-on-any-compile per L0 spec. Verifier-v1 OK on first POC. Only isRetReturnFunction kept as the single predicate; the P2 (failure-branch goto) and P3 (ret-still-zero-at-goto) logic from the parallel error-return C3 3-predicate plan is inlined verbatim in the final assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles on first try. Query fires on _buggy (poc.c:72 goto out_free_desc; poc.c:85 goto out_free_sha_regions) AND on _fixed (poc.c:175 goto out_free_sha_regions) — the fixed function still has other goto-out-of-if branches where ret is still 0 (crypto_shash_init failure path); this is a real over-approximation but L0 does NOT require pair-wise oracle to accept. Status=pass because final.ql compiled successfully.
